sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90583" key="prou+lakte/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προϋλακτέω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <sense id="n90583.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bark in defence of</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῶν τρεφόντων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:62" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.62</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (prob. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προσ-</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
